title: Is there a way to highlight a specific task/s on the board on the main board?
excerpt:
Is there a way to highlight a specific task/s on the main board without having to filter and save a view? I’m just looking for a task to be highlighted yellow or in bold to stand out from the others. 

Loom video explain…

posts.author: RyanSchneider (Ryan Schneider)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to highlight a specific task/s on the main board without having to filter and save a view? I’m just looking for a task to be highlighted yellow or in bold to stand out from the others.

  • Loom video explaining further (https://www.loom.com/share/5be865d1940840cda8e602e11a7e74b6?sid=f63586a1-6b53-4172-8ece-79ca16e0e8d0)
